items.text: AlpacaAmethyst near wooden bridge

items.name: Bunny
items.text: BunnyRoad that leads from Art Street into the suburbs where one road diverges into two

items.name: Capybara
items.text: CapybaraRuins in the circle area

items.name: Deer
items.text: DeerBetween Deer Tower & Spirit Oak Pine Forest

items.name: Ferret
items.text: FerretBelow Rosy River near wooden bridge

items.name: Sea Otter
items.text: Sea OtterFishing Village Square Harbor

items.name: Vanya
items.text: VanyaFishing MentorBlue-haired fishing expert who visits your home early in the game. Provides your first fishing rod and Hobby Expansion Ticket. In his shop you can find items to display your fish on your plot.Riverside DockView on MapTutorial (after first nap)Teaches Hobby: fishing

items.name: Blanc
items.text: BlancGardening MentorMaster of gardening and flowers. In his shop you'll find all sorts of seeds as you level up your Gardening passion. Tip: The bird on his head doesn't move, so use it to gain Birdwatching experience early!Gardening ShopView on MapTutorial (automatic)Teaches Hobby: gardening

items.name: Massimo
items.text: MassimoCooking MentorOur chef will teach you the passion of cooking! Just like with gardening, you'll need to cultivate your own produce if you want to cook. In his shop you'll find ingredients, recipes, and furniture. Tip: Cook with several stoves, but don't burn everything!CafeView on MapDeveloper Level 6 + Hobby Expansion TicketTeaches Hobby: cooking

items.name: Naniwa
items.text: NaniwaBug Catching MentorThe entomologist at Heartopia will teach you how to make beautiful bubbles to catch insects. His shop has everything for this hobby and terrariums!ForestView on MapDeveloper Level 6 + Hobby Expansion TicketTeaches Hobby: bug_catching

items.name: Bailey J
items.text: Bailey JBirdwatching MentorQueen of birdwatching! She'll help you by giving rewards. A shop is also available with binoculars and bird feed!Pet Store (upstairs) / ParkView on MapDeveloper Level 6 + Hobby Expansion TicketTeaches Hobby: birdwatching

items.name: Mrs. Joan
items.text: Mrs. JoanPet Care MentorPet shop owner who loves dogs and cats. Check her shop daily for pet food and accessories for our four-legged friends. You'll find what you're looking for, just be patient!Pet StoreView on MapDeveloper Level 12 + Hobby Expansion TicketTeaches Hobby: cat_care

items.name: Bob
items.text: BobFurniture MerchantOur grandpa's a handyman! Furniture displays change every Saturday at 6 AM and last for a week. Talk to him to access natural building materials for your plot.Town CenterView on MapTutorial

items.name: Annie
items.text: AnnieMusic & Emote ShopMusic and friendship speak to her! Her shop has instruments, emojis, and animations. Tip: New sales every day, take advantage of them!Near starting locationView on MapAvailable from start

items.name: Dorothee
items.text: DorotheeFashion Muse / Shoe ShopFashion muse! You'll find the perfect shoes at her shop. The clothing store changes every day, go check it out!TownView on MapAvailable from start

items.name: Ka Ching
items.text: Ka ChingCollectibles MerchantSmall shop featuring collectible puzzles!City (near Suburban Lake)View on MapVisit city area

items.name: Collector
items.text: CollectorLaunch Shop VendorLaunch shop with items on sale! Clothing, furniture, decorations - there's a little bit of everything!TownView on MapAvailable from start

items.name: Doris
items.text: DorisWeather MerchantA special merchant who only appears during specific weather conditions. She sells exclusive items like cake roll recipes, colored sugar, and limited emotes!Varies by weatherView on MapSpecial weather conditions

items.name: Albert Jr.
items.text: Albert Jr.Roaming BuyerThanks to this NPC, you can sell just about anything - from extra fish to garden harvest and tons of other things. Gold coins are super important in Heartopia; you'll need a lot of them for furniture and clothes!Roaming in suburbsView on MapRandom encounter

items.name: Andrew
items.text: AndrewVehicle MerchantHeartopia biker! Thanks to him you can get around on wheels rather than on foot, and let's not kid ourselves, it's faster!Town (after main quest)View on MapComplete main story quest

items.name: Bill
items.text: BillSea Fishing HostIf you want to participate in the Sea Fishing event with friends or strangers, Bill is the one you need to see!Fishing VillageView on MapUnlock fishing hobby

items.name: Atara
items.text: AtaraVillage MayorThe village mayor gives us a weekly quest and... that's it! He's not really useful at the moment.Town HallView on MapAvailable from start

items.name: Eric
items.text: EricFormer Theme Park ManagerA former theme park manager who hopes to revitalize Onsen Mountain as a tourist attraction. He initiates the 'Astralis in Onsen Mountain' quest where you help relocate moles. Completing his quest unlocks daily Flawless Fluorite farming.Onsen MountainView on MapProgress through Astralis storyline

items.name: Patti
items.text: PattiArtist / Forest RangerAn artist who stands guard at the Ranger Station near the forest entrance. She provides an Exploration Guide with tips on locating foraging points and handles Resource Monitoring, tracking wildlife populations and resources. Part of the Astralis storyline where you photograph the forest from her observation deck.Ranger Station (near forest entrance)View on MapVisit forest area

items.name: Vernie
items.text: VernieFlower Fields CaretakerThe girl who manages the flower fields and camps on the hill near the windmills. She's part of the Astralis main storyline where she asks you to find two teenagers and play music for them. Also involved in the Treasure Hunt gossip quest, providing hints about the trekking pole location.Flower Fields (hill with windmills)View on MapProgress through Astralis storyline

items.name: Will
items.text: WillLighthouse KeeperThe keeper of the lighthouse in Fishing Village. He watches over the coast and guides sailors safely to shore.Fishing Village LighthouseView on MapVisit Fishing Village

items.name: About This Database
items.text: About This DatabaseThis Heartopia character database & NPC wiki includes 20 villagers with unlock requirements, locations, hobbies, and loved gifts.Data collected from the community. Gift preferences and unlock requirements are verified in-game. If you find errors, please report them.Each character card shows their location, unlock requirement, hobby they teach, and favorite gifts. Use this guide to build friendships faster!Click "View on Map" on any character card to see their location on the interactive map. If the map doesn't locate the character, it means the positioning data is not yet available.Last updated: 2026-01-24

items.name: Find NPCs on the Map
items.text: Find NPCs on the MapUse our interactive map to locate all NPCs in the game and see exactly where to find them.

items.name: Track Your Collection
items.text: Track Your CollectionKeep track of which gifts and items you've discovered for each character. Never forget what you've already found!

items.name: Unlock Achievements
items.text: Unlock AchievementsDiscover all achievements related to character relationships and social interactions!

items.name: Ace Cat Servant
items.howToUnlock: Reach Level 10 in the Cat Caring Hobby.
items.tips: Be sure to feed, train, and play with your cat each day.Reward TitleCat Lover

items.name: Ace Dog Trainer
items.howToUnlock: Reach Level 10 in the Dog Caring Hobby.
items.tips: Be sure to feed, train, and play with your dog each day.Reward TitleDog Pal

items.name: Animal Keeper
items.howToUnlock: Discover the favorite food for all eight animal groups.
items.tips: Try various items in your inventory to discover what the animals like. Once discovered, it will show a heart when filling the Trough.Reward TitleDelicious

items.name: Animal Neighbor
items.howToUnlock: Reach Level 10 with eight different animal groups.
items.tips: Continue to check Animal Troughs and interact with them daily. Prioritize filling the Trough with their favorite food.Reward TitleNew Neighbor

items.name: Bird Whisperer
items.howToUnlock: Reach Level 10 of the Birdwatching Hobby.
items.tips: Participate in Birdwatching Events to boost this quicker.Reward TitleBird Whisperer

items.name: Cloud Walker
items.tips: Participate in Birdwatching Events with more people.Reward TitleSky

items.name: Collector
items.howToUnlock: Become an Expert Collector.
items.tips: Open your Collection icon on the Watch to see your current Collector Status. Expert Collector is the highest rank - track your progress with the meter.Reward TitleCollector

items.name: D.G. Member
items.howToUnlock: Reach Level 30 of the Developer's Guild.
items.tips: Continue to complete Daily Requests to increase your D.G. Rank.Reward TitleD.G. Member

items.name: Decisive Moment
items.howToUnlock: Obtain ten 5-Star Info Cards during a single Birdwatching Event.
items.tips: Increase your Birdwatching Hobby level to increase your odds of 5-Star Cards. Additionally, look for unique actions when Birdwatching.Reward TitleMoment

items.name: Doggie Canteen
items.howToUnlock: Feed three Dogs their favorite food.
items.tips: Feed your pet dog their favorite food and avoid going straight for the standard dog food sold at the pet shop.Reward TitleDog Food

items.name: Fast and Flawless
items.howToUnlock: Cook two 5-Star dishes within 60 seconds.
items.tips: Increase your Cooking Hobby level to be able to cook 5-Star dishes.Reward TitleKitchen Clock

items.name: Fishing Machine
items.howToUnlock: Catch 50 fish that are over 100kg each.
items.tips: This is cumulative, so look for larger shadows while fishing.Reward TitleFish Basket

items.name: Golden Music CD
items.howToUnlock: Max out the Musician Dream.
items.tips: Play, Record, and Publish Music for others to enjoy.Reward TitleMusic

items.name: Green Touch
items.howToUnlock: Reach Level 10 in the Gardening Hobby.
items.tips: Ensure you harvest crops as soon as they're ready and re-plant seeds immediately. Don't forget to water when necessary.Reward TitleHorticulturist

items.name: Ice Elf
items.howToUnlock: Max out the Figure Skating Dream to reach Ice Elf level.
items.tips: Practice figure skating regularly to improve your dream level.Reward TitleIce Skating

items.name: Joyful Chorus
items.tips: Participate in Birdwatching Events with more people.Reward TitleFeather

items.name: Meow-Meow Canteen
items.howToUnlock: Feed five Cats their favorite food.
items.tips: Feed your pet cat their favorite food and avoid going straight for the standard cat food sold at the pet shop.Reward TitleCat Food

items.name: Mystic Fisher
items.tips: Try to organize or participate in Fishing Events with more people for increased chances.Reward TitleFisher

items.name: Never Empty-Handed
items.howToUnlock: Reach Level 10 of the Fishing Hobby
items.tips: Participate in Fishing Events to boost this quicker.Reward TitleSkilled Angler

items.name: Persistent Quill
items.howToUnlock: Max out the Writing Dream.
items.tips: Write books using the Writing Desk and publish them for others to read.Reward TitleWriting

items.name: Plentiful Harvest
items.howToUnlock: Harvest 5-Star crops while Bonus Harvest is active.
items.tips: Increase your Gardening Hobby rank to increase your odds. The Bonus Harvest event takes place during Rainbow weather.Reward TitleHarvest

items.name: Pumpkinarchy
items.howToUnlock: Reach Level Five of the Pumpkin Carving Hobby.
items.tips: Seasonal Hobby that is only available during a limited time of the year.Reward TitlePumpkin Head

items.name: Puzzle Artist
items.howToUnlock: Max out the Puzzle Dream.
items.tips: Purchase new puzzles from Ka Ching and complete them.Reward TitlePuzzle

items.name: Rainbow Luck
items.tips: Rainbows are a rare phenomenon, so be sure to check your Watch for the upcoming weather so you don't miss the next Rainbow.Reward TitleRainbow Luck

items.name: Rocket Sponsor
items.howToUnlock: Earn 500,000 Gold by selling items to Albert Jr.
items.tips: Sell high-value items to Albert Jr., like prepared dishes or crafted items.Reward TitleRocket

items.name: Shark Frenzy
items.howToUnlock: Catch three Sharks from Golden Fish Shadows during a single Sea Fishing Event.
items.tips: Continue to increase your Fishing Hobby rank and prioritize golden shadows during Sea Fishing Events.Reward TitleShark Cage

items.name: Shoal Caller
items.tips: You can trigger these on a solo trip, but they're more likely to trigger if you have a larger group on a Fishing Event.Reward TitleShoal Caller

items.name: Shoal's Blessing
items.tips: Try to organize or participate in Fishing Events with more people for increased chances.Reward TitleBlessing

items.name: Snow King
items.howToUnlock: Reach Level Five of the Snow Sculpting Hobby.
items.tips: Seasonal Hobby that is only available during a limited time of the year.Reward TitleSnow King

items.name: Stardust Collector
items.howToUnlock: Collect 60 Starfall Shards.
items.tips: Starfall Shards can be collected during Meteor Showers, which you can anticipate by checking the upcoming weather on your Watch.Reward TitleStar Picker

items.name: Starlight Fisher
items.howToUnlock: Catch four 5-Star Fish in a single Fishing Event.
items.tips: Increase your Fishing Hobby rank to be able to catch 5-Star Fish.Reward TitleFishing Maniac

items.name: Strong Sailor
items.howToUnlock: Catch fish over 100kg twice. Must be consecutive.
items.tips: Prioritize larger shadows while fishing during a Fishing Event.Reward TitleFishing Line

items.name: Town Cooking Legend
items.howToUnlock: Reach Level 10 in the Cooking Hobby.
items.tips: Experiment with ingredients to make new recipe variations. If you have no new recipes, consider cooking jam or other items that cook quickly.Reward TitleChef

items.name: Twin Fish Fortune
items.howToUnlock: Catch two 5-Star fish within one minute.
items.tips: Easier to accomplish during a Fishing Event, but you will need to be ranked higher in the Fishing Hobby.Reward TitleOsprey
